name: TreeItemContentProps
description:
A TreeItemContent renders the contents of a TreeItem's row: the expand
chevron, an optional selection checkbox and drag handle, and the item label.

children.description:
The children of the component. A function may be provided to alter the children based on
component state.

hasChildItems.description: Whether the tree item has child tree items.

isDisabled.description:
Whether the item is non-interactive, i.e. both selection and actions are disabled and the item
may not be focused. Dependent on `disabledKeys` and `disabledBehavior`.

isDragging.description: Whether the item is currently being dragged.

isDropTarget.description: Whether the item is currently an active drop target.

isExpanded.description: Whether the tree item is expanded.

isFocused.description: Whether the item is currently focused.

isFocusVisible.description: Whether the item is currently keyboard focused.

isFocusVisibleWithin.description: Whether the tree item's children have keyboard focus.

isHovered.description: Whether the item is currently hovered with a mouse.

isPressed.description: Whether the item is currently in a pressed state.

isSelected.description: Whether the item is currently selected.

level.description: What level the tree item has within the tree.

selectionMode.description: The type of selection that is allowed in the collection.

hasChildItems.name: hasChildItems
hasChildItems.description: Whether the tree item has child tree items.

id.name: id
id.description: The unique id of the tree row.
